allow: Bash(cd ~ && curl -O https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/linux/flutter_linux_3.24.0-stable.tar.xz && tar xf flutter_linux_3.24.0-stable.tar.xz && rm flutter_linux_3.24.0-stable.tar.xz)

Bash(mkdir -p ~/.npm-global && npm config set prefix '~/.npm-global' && echo 'export PATH=~/.npm-global/bin:$PATH' >> ~/.bashrc && export PATH=~/.npm-global/bin:$PATH && npm install vercel@32)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
